onboarding.welcomeIntro: Save your notes and access them from anywhere.

recycleBinWindow.title: Recycle Bin
recycleBinWindow.name: Name
recycleBinWindow.confirmText: Are you sure you want to empty the Recycle Bin?

aboutWindow.description: A notepad web application that emulates the classic Windows XP interface, integrating cloud persistence and advanced window management features.

techList.frontend: React + Vite for a fast development environment and optimized bundles.
techList.styling: Tailwind CSS + XP.css for the base of classic components, ensuring visual fidelity.
techList.state: Custom useWindowManager hook for z-index control, minimization, and window restoration without losing component state.
techList.persistence: Supabase (PostgreSQL & Auth) with Row Level Security (RLS) policies for per-user data protection.
techList.resilience: Robust localStorage implementation for 'Guest' (Anonymous) mode, allowing instant offline-first use.

highlightsList.manager: Own Window Manager: Built from scratch without third-party libraries, allowing fine DOM control.
highlightsList.optimization: Rendering Optimization: Use of display: none on minimization preserves React states.
highlightsList.sync: Secure Synchronization: Controlled asynchronous use when saving notes (Debounce/Interval).

aboutWindow.noteDescription: This project demonstrates the ability to create complex non-conventional interfaces (Desktop-on-Web), advanced global state management, and secure integration with BaaS.

profileWindow.title: My Profile

profileWindow.helpText: Problems with your account or files? Contact our technical team:
